spec_match.rationale: Excellent side-by-side matrix. Compares auto, chain, contain, and none in a very clear and accessible table.

interactive.rationale: Very interactive: features 4 separate side-by-side scroll card components, tracking individual scroll offsets dynamically in real-time.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Aligned with the parent matrix comparison blurb.

edge_cases.rationale: Handles scroll listeners independently for all 4 components without any crossing states.

references.rationale: The page has no 'see also' links list and does not cite the mandatory ChromeStatus tracking reference.

design_system.rationale: Beautiful implementation. Employs pristine dark console log strips and clean comparison grid rows.

openQuestions.title: Add see also references section with ChromeStatus link
openQuestions.detail: Add a see also links list at the bottom of the page citing the canonical ChromeStatus feature link https://chromestatus.com/feature/5176802466201600 to conform to showcase guidelines.
